data.current_description: NOTE: the POST version of this endpoint should be used in production code. GET requests may fail due to request length limitations when using large `filter` and `select` expressions.
data.summary_suggestion: Create or update an asset by ID
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new asset or updates an existing asset identified by assetId. Accepts asset data in the request body and returns the created or updated asset object. Note: The POST version of this endpoint is recommended for production use. This endpoint supports upsert behavior - if the asset exists, it will be replaced; if it does not exist, a new asset will be created. Returns the complete asset object with all properties after the operation.
data.reasoning: Current description is incomplete and misleading - it references GET requests and filter/select expressions which are not relevant to a PUT operation. Missing critical details about request body expectations, response format, upsert behavior, and side effects. Summary is vague about the upsert semantics. Improved version clarifies the operation's purpose, expected inputs, outputs, and behavioral characteristics for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'delete_asset_assetId' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate and action-oriented. Description is too minimal and lacks essential details about what parameters are required, what the response contains, and the permanent nature of the deletion. Enhanced description clarifies input requirements, response behavior, and side effects (permanent removal and subsequent not-found responses) to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.description_suggestion: Deletes an asset identified by assetId. Requires the assetId path parameter. Returns a success response confirming deletion. This operation permanently removes the asset and all associated data from the system. Subsequent requests for the deleted asset will return a not-found error.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate and action-oriented.
